meta_title: For Founders: email automation to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to email automation and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Email Automation to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to build email automation to overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS validation.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for the 'perfect' idea. Build a high-leverage email automation tool that scrapes niche forums, summarizes trends, and delivers curated lead lists. By focusing on data curation rather than complex features, you solve a burning pain point for marketers while validating your technical stack in under 48 hours.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You stare at the blinking cursor, paralyzed by the fear that your next project will be another forgotten repo in a sea of abandoned SaaS experiments. The market doesn't care about your clever code; it cares about the friction you remove from their workflow.

The secret isn't a 'better' idea; it's a faster feedback loop. By building an automated email engine that transforms chaotic web data into actionable intelligence, you stop guessing what the market wants and start delivering it. This is how you transition from an aspiring tinkerer to a founder who ships.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop
steps.description: Identify a specific niche (e.g., Shopify store owners) and define the email trigger: sending a weekly summary of their competitor's new product launches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean product specification for a SaaS tool that scrapes niche e-commerce product launches and sends a weekly automated summary email. Focus on the core value proposition and MVP feature set.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a markdown PRD for an automated email curation tool.'

steps.title: Scrape and Aggregate Data
steps.description: Set up a lightweight scraper to monitor target platforms for specific keywords, ensuring the data source is high-signal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Python script using BeautifulSoup and Playwright to scrape the latest product launches from a target niche forum. Ensure it filters for high-engagement posts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a scraper.py that fetches latest posts from target URL and saves them to a local JSON file.'

steps.title: Automate the Email Logic
steps.description: Integrate a transactional email provider (like Resend) to dispatch your curated content to a subscriber list.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a modular function using the Resend API to send a formatted HTML email containing the scraped data. Include error handling for failed API requests.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement mailer.py using Resend API to send the scraped JSON data as a clean HTML email.'

steps.title: Schedule the Workflow
steps.description: Deploy your script to a serverless environment to ensure your emails go out on a consistent, automated schedule.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow YAML file that triggers the scraping and mailing scripts every Monday at 9 AM UTC.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a .github/workflows/main.yml file to schedule my scraper and mailer scripts.'

steps.title: Validate and Iterate
steps.description: Ship the MVP to 10 potential users. Use their feedback to refine the email content and trigger criteria.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold outreach email template to potential beta testers that highlights the value of the curated email digest without mentioning the technical stack.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Draft a 3-email sequence for user feedback collection following the MVP launch.'

pro_tips: Don't build a dashboard; the email itself is your dashboard. Keep the UI surface area near zero.
Use a 'Reply-to' address that goes directly to your personal inbox to force immediate customer discovery conversations.
Prioritize data quality over frequency; one high-value email per week beats five low-value emails per day.
Build in public by sharing the 'boring' metrics like subscriber growth and open rates on X/Twitter.
Focus on the 'unbundling' strategy: take a massive, noisy platform and curate the signal for a specific sub-niche.
content.next_steps: Once your first 10 users are receiving the email, implement a simple Stripe checkout link in the footer of your emails to test monetization immediately.
content.conversion_block: You now have the framework to move from idea to execution in record time. Stop over-engineering and start solving real problems for real people. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
